title: Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh with a Z-Score of +5.06. This is a critical event with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh is causing extremely hot conditions with a CDD of 16.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 15% and the wind speed is 4.1 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no cooling degree days, and the situation is critical.
